postings.title: Staff Hardware Engineer: Connectivity Modules
postings.summary: This role involves designing and developing connectivity modules for General Motors, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and RF systems. The candidate's team lead experience is also a plus for this position.

postings.title: Systems Software Engineer, Wireless Technologies & Ecosystems
postings.summary: This role involves developing core wireless technologies for Apple, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and RF systems. The candidate's experience in signal processing is also a plus for this position.

postings.title: RF / Wireless Systems Engineer
postings.summary: This role involves turning noisy wireless signals into reliable, actionable intelligence for Sweep360, which aligns with the candidate's experience in RF systems and signal processing. The candidate's experience in system modeling is also a plus for this position.

postings.title: Principal Product Manager, Connectivity
postings.summary: This role involves leading the development of connectivity products for Axon, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and RF systems. The candidate's experience in product development and team management is also a plus for this position.

postings.title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer - IoT Wireless Applications
postings.summary: This role involves developing embedded software for IoT wireless applications for Silicon Laboratories, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and RF systems. The candidate's experience in system design and signal processing is also a plus for this position.
